heartbeat.note: Stale 57591s (mtime 2026-05-11T10:01:30Z) at snapshot; resumed 02:05:03Z per status pull. FU-20260511-008 active.

signals.note: VWAP long signals every ~7min, htf_blocked=false, R:R 4-9:1. Confirmed via journal DB; audit writer broken separately.

orders.note: 3x exchange_rejected ErrCode 110007 on bybit_2 at 00:12-00:15Z triggered circuit breaker. 7 orphaned packages.

trades.note: 3 closed (TP x2, SL x1) from 13:38-14:33Z May 11. 3 exchange_rejected. 50+ dry_run rejected. 0 open positions.

monitoring.note: Reconciler active (orphan ops at 12:30Z and 15:12Z May 11). run_monitor_tick absent from snapshot (collector limit).

sizing.note: ErrCode 110007 cluster: qty=0.01 BTC at ~$81,600 (~$272 required margin at 3x). bybit_2 balance may be insufficient.

api_errors.note: Telegram polling clean (200 OK every 10s). Old errors Apr 19 and May 7-8 only. No current API issues.

state_consistency.note: bybit_2 auto-paused by circuit breaker ~00:15Z. bybit_1 and prop_velotrade_1 also live=False (pre-existing dry_run).

alert_delivery.note: Circuit breaker fired ~00:15Z. Journalctl not pulled; Telegram alert delivery unconfirmed. Check Telegram manually.

strategy_silence.note: Zero *_eval audit events in 6h (audit writer broken since 14:27Z May 11). Strategies ARE running per journal DB.

db_integrity.note: Collector checks stale /home/ubuntu/ DB (4.6MB, 10.8h stale). Active /data/bot-data/ DB is fresh (5.3MB, 02:01Z, ok).

audit_log_freshness.note: signal_audit.jsonl last event 14:27:41Z May 11 (smoke_open_result, 11.5h stale). events_last_hour=0. Writer broken.

anomalies: CRITICAL: signal_audit.jsonl writer broken since 14:27Z May 11 (~11.5h). PID 104141 (started ~22:21Z) not writing audit events; journal DB writer functional. Likely code regression or permission issue at git SHA 2243506. Open new follow-up.

CONCERN: bybit_2 auto-paused by circuit breaker after 3x ErrCode 110007 ('ab not enough for new order') at 00:12-00:15Z May 12. Account in dry_run since. Operator must: (a) check bybit_2 available balance; (b) reset circuit breaker when ready to resume live trading.

trade_decision_grades.rationale: TP hit and ran $240 past TP1 (monitor market-closed on TP cross, positive slippage). R:R 5.24:1 realised. Signal logic not in trades table but outcome textbook.
trade_decision_grades.alternative_action: none

trade_decision_grades.rationale: SL correctly set ($85 below entry). Exit filled $92 below SL (80572 vs 80665) — 2x slippage vs SL gap. Risk contained but execution imprecise.
trade_decision_grades.alternative_action: Investigate SL execution path for slippage >1x SL gap; consider tighter monitor polling or limit-order SL.

trade_decision_grades.rationale: Clean TP fill at 80982 (+$7.81 above TP1=80974). R:R 5.01:1. Textbook VWAP mean-reversion long. SL and TP properly wired.
trade_decision_grades.alternative_action: none

trade_decision_grades.rationale: Rep. for cluster 1151-1153. 3x ErrCode 110007 at qty=0.01 BTC (~$81,600, ~$272 margin at 3x): exceeded available balance. Auto-tripped circuit breaker.
trade_decision_grades.alternative_action: Pre-flight balance check before dispatch; lower qty cap or top up bybit_2 margin before re-enabling live.

trade_decision_grades.rationale: Rep. of 50+ dry_run batch (1154-1207). Price 2.02 std-devs below VWAP, htf_blocked=false, R:R ~4:1. SL/TP correct. Rejected only by account_mode_dry_run.
trade_decision_grades.alternative_action: Reset circuit breaker only after confirming bybit_2 balance and ErrCode 110007 root cause resolved.

recommended_action: 1. Check bybit_2 available margin (ErrCode 110007 cluster at qty=0.01 BTC, ~$272 margin at 3x). 2. Reset circuit breaker only after confirming adequate balance. 3. Investigate signal_audit.jsonl writer failure in PID 104141 (git SHA 2243506) — compare pipeline.py audit write path vs prior commit. 4. Fetch journalctl?unit=ict-trader-live.service&since=2026-05-11T10:00:00Z&lines=2000 to diagnose heartbeat writer failure (FU-20260511-008). 5. Open cleanup PR for BybitConnector dead code (FU-20260511-006).
